title: Reusable Metallic Plastic Cutlery Set | 18-Pcs Party Cutlery Set with 6 Forks – 6 Knives – 6 Spoons | Durable Food-Grade Plastic | Elegant Metallic Finish | Ideal for Parties – BBQs – Picnics & Events
features: Complete 18-Piece Set: Includes 6 forks, 6 knives, and 6 spoons – perfect for serving guests at parties, events, or outdoor meals with style and convenience.
Elegant Metallic Finish: Eye-catching metallic effect gives the look of real metal cutlery, adding a touch of sophistication to any table setting without the cost or hassle.
Reusable & Durable: Made from high-quality, food-grade plastic that is strong, sturdy, and reusable – simply hand wash and reuse for your next occasion.
Perfect for All Occasions: Ideal for birthdays, weddings, BBQs, picnics, camping trips, and festive gatherings where ease and elegance matter.
Lightweight & Portable: Easy to carry and store, making it great for on-the-go dining or packing into picnic baskets and party supplies.
Eco-Friendly Alternative: Reduce single-use plastic waste by reusing this stylish cutlery set – a smart and sustainable solution for modern entertaining.
description: Introduction: Stylish Metallic Plastic Cutlery Set – 18-Piece Reusable Party Dining Set Upgrade your next celebration or casual gathering with this elegant 18-Piece Metallic Effect Cutlery Set . Designed to offer the convenience of disposable cutlery with the look and feel of real metal, this set is ideal for hosts who want to impress without the cleanup. Perfect for birthdays, weddings, BBQs, picnics, and other events, this reusable cutlery set brings a polished touch to any meal. Made from high-quality, food-grade plastic , the utensils are lightweight yet durable enough for repeated use. The shimmering metallic finish enhances your table presentation, whether you're indoors or outdoors. Benefits & Features: 18 total pieces: 6 forks, 6 knives, 6 spoons Reusable and easy to clean – hand wash only Sleek, metallic effect mimics real cutlery Lightweight and travel-friendly for on-the-go events Durable plastic material suitable for hot or cold foods Specifications: Total Pieces: 18 (6 forks, 6 knives, 6 spoons) Material: Food-grade plastic Finish: Metallic effect (not real metal) Care Instructions: Hand wash only – reusable Packaged Dimensions: 25.5 x 12 x 3.5 cm Packaged Weight: 0.087 kg Package Includes: 6 x Forks 6 x Spoons 6 x Knives Whether you're hosting an elegant dinner or planning a picnic in the park, this reusable metallic cutlery set is a must-have. Stylish, sturdy, and sustainable – it's the smarter way to serve.
